name: Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can crushed pineapple in syrup (20 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch pan.
3. Dump undrained pineapple into the pan and spread evenly over the pineapple.
4. Dump in the pie filling and spread evenly over the pineapple.
5. Dump dry cake mix onto the cherry layer and spread evenly.
6. Sprinkle pecans over the cake mix.
7. Put margarine, cut into thin slices, on top.
8. Bake for 48-53 minutes. Serve warm or cold.
COOKS NOTE: Serve with ice cream or whipped topping. You can substitute other pie filling flavors or different fruits in syrup. Walnuts can be substituted for pecans, and 1 cup coconut can be added with nuts. Makes 12 servings, each with 359 calories.
